meta.title: Custom Software Development for SMEs | Process Automation | DIGITALSKY
meta.description: Bespoke web applications, CRM systems, API integrations and process automation for production, services and e-commerce businesses. Software built around YOUR business.
meta.og_title: Custom Software Development for SMEs | DIGITALSKY

hero.h1: Custom software built around your business.
hero.h1_sub_3: No more manual work holding you back.
hero.p: Struggling with chaotic processes, disconnected systems, and outdated software holding your growth back? Digitalsky designs custom web applications, process automation, and system integrations that fit exactly how your business works.

problem.h2: Your Business Deserves Better Than Generic Software
problem.p1: Most SMEs face the same chaos — and most off-the-shelf tools make it worse, not better.
problem.p2: You're not alone. But you can fix it — with software designed around the way you actually work.
problem.bullet1: Manual workflows wasting hours every day
problem.bullet2: Legacy systems that don't talk to each other
problem.bullet3: Poor data flow blocking real-time decisions
problem.bullet4: Custom needs crushed by off-the-shelf tools
problem.bullet5: No clear path to AI-ready, scalable processes

services.sub: We don't sell hours. We deliver automated, flawless systems — fully owned by your business.
services.bento1_p: Built for your exact workflows, not generic templates. Manage data securely with bespoke interfaces designed purely for speed and your team's daily reality — not someone else's idea of how you should work.
services.bento2_p: Data flows designed completely around your unique customer journey. Stop forcing your business into Salesforce boxes. Own a CRM that actually reflects how you sell and serve.
services.bento3_p: Scalable platforms completely owned by your business, ready for market. From MVP to full product — built to grow with you.
services.bento4_p: Connecting your existing tools so data moves effortlessly between systems. Eliminate double-entry, sync platforms automatically in real-time, and stop losing hours to copy-paste work that software should handle.

industries.sub: Every industry has its own chaos. We've seen it — and built systems that tame it.
industries.prod_p: Manufacturing execution systems, inventory automation, and shop-floor dashboards that connect your machinery data with your planning teams — in real time.
industries.svc_p: Client portals, automated scheduling, billing workflows, and service CRMs that eliminate double-entry and give your team more time to actually serve clients.
industries.ecom_p: Custom checkouts, multi-platform inventory sync, and order automation that removes the manual work between your store, warehouse, and fulfilment.
industries.start_p: MVP platforms built to validate fast and scale without rebuilding. From idea to working product — with the technical foundation that grows with your business.

process.h2: How We Work — Simple, Direct, Effective
process.sub: No long onboarding. No agency layers. No miscommunication. Just a clear path from problem to working solution.
process.step1_p: We listen, map your current chaos, and meticulously analyze your data flows — before writing a single line of code.
process.step2_p: Propose exact solutions with clear architecture backed by testable prototypes you can evaluate in week one.
process.step3_p: Iterative delivery with your feedback guiding every step. You see real progress — not a black box that opens after months.
process.step4_p: Full SLA, monitoring, and continuous product evolution. We stay with you — support, improvements, and scaling as you grow.
process.founder_p: You work directly with the senior expert who designs and builds your solution. No account managers, no junior handoffs, no miscommunication between what you ask and what gets built. Just results.

why.sub: Not a software house. A focused technology partner — with skin in the game on your success.
why.card1_p: You work with the person who codes your solution — not a project manager relaying messages to a team you'll never meet.
why.card2_p: We fix processes, not just write code. Every line of software we build is justified by a real business outcome — time saved, errors eliminated, revenue unlocked.
why.card3_p: Support, SLA, and product evolution included. We don't disappear after launch — we grow with you as your business scales and your needs evolve.
why.card4_p: Competitive pricing and fast decisions. Without layers of account managers, sales reps, and middle managers, your budget goes into building — not overhead.
why.card5_p: We understand your scale and constraints. Since 2016 we've worked exclusively with growing businesses — we know what works at your size and what's just expensive overkill.
why.card6_p: Full source code ownership, no vendor lock-in. Your system, your data, your IP — from day one.

cases.sub: Every number below represents hours saved, errors eliminated, and frustration removed from real teams.
cases.cs1_p1: A growing e-commerce business was managing stock across 5 platforms using Excel spreadsheets — leading to constant overselling, returns, and angry customers.
cases.cs1_p2: We replaced the entire manual process with a real-time API sync engine. Orders, stock levels, and fulfilment now update automatically across all channels.
cases.cs2_p1: A mid-size manufacturer was spending 40+ hours per week on manual production scheduling in spreadsheets — with planners constantly firefighting errors.
cases.cs2_p2: We built a custom dashboard directly integrated with their machinery APIs, giving real-time visibility and automated schedule generation.
cases.cs3_p1: A service company was onboarding new clients over 2 days using emails, PDFs, and manual data entry — creating errors and a poor first impression.
cases.cs3_p2: We built a tailored CRM with automated onboarding flows matching their exact service delivery workflow. New clients are now active in 15 minutes.

faq.sub: The questions every SME asks before starting a custom software project.
faq.q1: How long does custom development take?
faq.a1: Most projects take 4–12 weeks depending on scope. A focused internal tool or API integration is typically live in 4–6 weeks. A more complex CRM or SaaS platform with multiple integrations takes 8–12 weeks. We always prototype in week one — so you see real progress immediately and can course-correct early rather than late.
faq.q2: How much does custom software cost?
faq.a2: Cost depends entirely on what you need built. Targeted integrations and internal tools are often comparable to — or less than — a year's subscription to a generic platform that only partly solves your problem. We work on a fixed-scope, fixed-price basis: after the free process audit you receive a clear proposal with no hourly billing surprises. We'll always tell you honestly if an off-the-shelf solution would serve you better.
faq.a3: We use PHP / Laravel for robust backend systems, and Svelte or Angular on the frontend — chosen based on your project's needs, not our preference. We're deliberately framework-agnostic and avoid technology overload: no unnecessary complexity, no trendy stacks that become a maintenance burden. The goal is a system your team can actually use and trust long-term.
faq.q4: Who owns the code after delivery?
faq.a4: You own everything — 100%. Full source code, database structure, documentation. No vendor lock-in, no licensing fees, no dependency on us to keep your system running. You can take it to any developer in the future. We believe that's the only ethical way to work with a client.
faq.q5: Do you offer ongoing support after launch?
faq.a5: Yes — we offer on-demand support without a mandatory monthly retainer. If something breaks, you call us. If you need a new feature, we scope it and build it. No paying for support you don't use. For business-critical systems we can arrange a formal SLA with defined response times — discuss this during the audit.
faq.q6: Can you work with our existing systems?
faq.a6: Absolutely. Most engagements start with existing tools — ERP systems, legacy databases, third-party platforms, or even well-established Excel workflows. We connect, extend, or replace them based on what makes sense. You don't need to rebuild from scratch. We work with your reality, not a blank-slate ideal.
faq.q7: What's the process for getting started?
faq.a7: Three steps: (1) Free 30-minute process audit — we map your workflows and identify the highest-impact areas. (2) Custom proposal with clear scope, timeline, and fixed price — usually delivered within 3 business days. (3) Prototype in week one — a working proof-of-concept before any significant investment is made. No commitment until you're confident it's the right direction.
faq.q8: Do we need an in-house IT team to use or manage the system?
faq.a8: No. We build systems designed to be operated by your existing team without technical knowledge. Admin interfaces are straightforward, documentation is included, and we handle hosting, updates, and infrastructure on your behalf. If you ever want to bring it in-house, everything is documented and transferable.

contact.h2: Ready to Fix Your Process Chaos?
contact.p1: We'd love to hear about you and your business.
contact.p2: Tell us what you're working on — we'll show you exactly how we can help. No commitment, no pressure.
contact.placeholder_msg: Tell us what's slowing your team down — Excel hell, disconnected systems, manual data entry…
contact.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you within 1 business day.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please email us directly at contact@digitalsky.pl
contact.validation_required: Please fill in your name, email and project details.
contact.validation_email: Please enter a valid email address.

ai.p: AI isn't a magic wand. It's a precision tool — and the difference between a chatbot bolted on top and AI woven into your operations is the difference between a gimmick and a genuine competitive edge. We build AI-powered systems that actually do the work.
ai.pillar1_p: Leads scored automatically. Follow-ups drafted. Client sentiment flagged before you even open the email. Your CRM stops being a database — and becomes an assistant that never sleeps.
ai.pillar2_p: Documents classified. Invoices read and routed. Anomalies caught in real time. The repetitive, rule-based tasks your team dreads — handed off to a system that does them faster and without mistakes.
ai.pillar3_p: Customer communications, product descriptions, internal reports — translated and localised instantly with context-aware AI. Not just words swapped — meaning preserved across every language your business operates in.
ai.pillar4_p: Demand forecasts. Churn signals. Bottleneck predictions. Surface the insight buried in your own data — before the problem becomes a crisis.
ai.pillar5_p: Ask your own business data a question in plain language. Contracts, customer history, production logs — answered in seconds. No more digging through folders.
ai.pillar6_p: Trained on your processes, your products, your tone. Not a generic chatbot — a specialist that knows your business and handles tier-1 queries, onboarding, and internal support at scale.
ai.flow_title: How AI Plugs Into Your Stack
ai.flow_sub: We don't rip out what works. We layer intelligence on top of your existing systems — connecting AI models to the tools your team already uses.
ai.cta_h: Ready to put AI to work — not just on a demo slide?
ai.cta_p: Tell us your biggest manual bottleneck. We'll show you exactly how AI can eliminate it.

footer.seo: Digitalsky — custom software development for SMEs in Poland, EU and the US since 2016. We specialise in bespoke web application development, business process automation, API integrations, tailored CRM systems and internal admin tools. Our clients operate in manufacturing, e-commerce, professional services and the startup sector. We use PHP / Laravel backends and Svelte or Angular frontends, chosen to match your project — not to follow trends. All source code is fully owned by you from day one, with no vendor lock-in. Looking for a software development partner who understands small and medium businesses? Contact us at contact@digitalsky.pl.
